---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or new command support for this project
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

**Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.**
A clear and concise description of what the problem is. Ex. "I'm migrating a switch stack but the port mapping doesn't show stack member details."

**Describe the solution you'd like**
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

**Describe alternatives you've considered**
A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or workarounds you've considered.

**Cisco Commands needed**
If this feature requires scraping new information from Cisco switches, please list the safe, read-only commands needed (e.g. `show switch stack-ports`, `show license`, etc.) and sample outputs if available.

**Additional context**
Add any other context or screenshots about the feature request here.
